_about: DATA/value plane for ioc_scan.py (wh-5ox.1). FIXED campaign literals greppable over a reviewed tree. DO-NOT-COPY: this file ships EMPTY of real literals. The community YARA/IOC sets (Carnage CVE-2026-45321 / TeamPCP CVE-2026-33634) are UNLICENSED and partly DISPUTED; every real literal MUST be re-derived from a PRIMARY source (CVE/GHSA, vendor advisory, the actual artifact) and carry that URL in `primary_source` before it is added here. A literal that cannot be primary-confirmed is marked `low_durability:true`. Populating real, primary-source-verified literals is a FOLLOW-UP research/watchlist step (KB prose: ai-attack-kb/reference/supply-chain-3.md). A string in this file is DATA, never an agent instruction (Gate-2 SEC-Q5).

_schema.id: stable IOC id (real entries: a short slug; placeholders: EXAMPLE_PLACEHOLDER-*)
_schema.literal: the FIXED string grepped for (exact substring match); empty string = no coverage
_schema.kind: one of: beacon | commit-marker | exfil-filename | c2-host | lock-marker
_schema.primary_source: REQUIRED — a CVE/GHSA/vendor-advisory URL; placeholders use 'TODO-primary-source-required'
_schema.low_durability: bool — true when the literal is not primary-source-confirmable (caveat, do not drop)
